variants.title: HiFi Filter SG 5010 Gas Filter | Replaces the SF Filter SAO 51259
variants.description: The genuine HiFi Filter SG 5010 Gas Filter is HiFi's replacement to the SF Filter SAO 51259. Easy to install and replace, the SG 5010 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
